case_title: BEAUDOIN, CHRISTOPHER et al VS JOHNSON, SHANA et al

docket_entries.description: SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT JOHNSON, SHANA

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY BEAUDOIN, CHRISTOPHER BIDGOOD, RICHARD AS TO DEFENDANT JOHNSON, SHANA THE RAVANCE CORP. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-28-2004 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BEAUDOIN, CHRISTOPHER RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT JOHNSON, SHANA THE RAVANCE CORP. $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $81.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,081.50, DEFENDANT FAILED TO APPEAR. PLAINTIFF DISMISSES ORDER AGAINST THE RAVANCE CORP. PLAINTIFF - RICHARD BIDGOOD FAILED TO APPEAR AND TAKES NOTHING FROM DEFENDANT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
